M1200A_PRSR_RDC_CHR_CD M1200A_PRSR_RDC_CHR_CD M1200A Skin and Ulcer Treatments: Pressure Reducing Device in Chair Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that a pressure reducing device is used in the resident's chair. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
